free instant test

Scroll Speed Test

You scroll all day — but how far, exactly? This test measures the physical distance your thumb covers in ten seconds, in feet and inches. It started as a joke about doomscrolling and became weirdly competitive. Your daily scroll distance would frighten you; at least here it counts as a score.

▶  START THE TEST
Casual scroller20–30 ft / 10s
The darebeat 41.2 ft
Unit of measurementreal feet + inches
Side effectmild self-awareness

Questions

How far does the average person scroll per day?

Widely cited estimates put daily phone scrolling around the height of a building — this test measures your 10-second sprint pace in feet so you can do the scary math yourself.

Does scroll speed matter?

As a benchmark it’s pure fun — but seeing your speed in physical feet is a surprisingly effective way to notice how automatic scrolling has become.
